summary: After receiving a reward from the Emperor for defeating a monster, Kang Hyunwoo visits Duke Lebron's manor to select a unique skill book. He chooses the 'Heavenly Demon's Dark Arts,' which grants him powerful abilities and triggers a new quest. Duke Lebron subsequently tasks Hyunwoo with a challenging mission in the Ragged Mountains, signaling the start of the next main scenario that attracts the attention of other players and guilds.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo receives a reward and a skill book from the Emperor for his previous accomplishments.
Hyunwoo selects the unique 'Heavenly Demon's Dark Arts' skill book from the imperial library.
Duke Lebron assigns Hyunwoo a difficult mission in the Ragged Mountains, marking the beginning of the fifth main scenario.
